message:
🌱 istio: Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays into nested objects (#1133)

* 🌱 Add istio: Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct istio namespace to istio-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-21340-istio-s-authorizationpolicy-doesn-t-look-for-jwt-s-arrays-into-neste",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays into nested objects",
+    "description": "Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays into nested objects. This issue affects 18+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your istio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
Hello,

I want to report an issue found reading the JWT token by the AuthorizationPolicy-kind YAML."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays…",
+        "description": "Hello, we have the same problem.  We cannot read "client.sco" value or any value from a nested node 
```{
  "iss": "******",
  "jti": "******",
  "azp": "******",
  "iat": 000000000,
  "exp": 000000000,
  "nonce": "0000000",
  "ver": 1,
  "client": {
    "cli": "***",
    "pid": "*",
    "pty":
```yaml
...
  "realm_access": {
    "roles": [
      "TEST-READ",
      "offline_access",
      "uma_authorization",
      "user"
    ]
  },
  "resource_access": {
    "istio": {
      "roles": [
        "user"
      ]
    },
    "account": {
      "roles": [
        "manage-account",
        "manage-account-links",
        "view-profile"
      ]
    }
  },
  "scope": "profile email",
...
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hello, we have the same problem.  We cannot read "client.sco" value or any value from a nested node 
```{
  "iss": "******",
  "jti": "******",
  "azp": "******",
  "iat": 000000000,
  "exp": 000000000,
  "nonce": "0000000",
  "ver": 1,
  "client": {
    "cli": "***",
    "pid": "*",
    "pty": "***",
    "uid": "*",
    "sco": "read write"
  },
  "cnf": {
    "jwks": [
      {
        "kid":",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "...
  "realm_access": {
    "roles": [
      "TEST-READ",
      "offline_access",
      "uma_authorization",
      "user"
    ]
  },
  "resource_access": {
    "istio": {
      "roles": [
        "user"
      ]
    },
    "account": {
      "roles": [
        "manage-account",
        "manage-account-links",
        "view-profile"
      ]
    }
  },
  "scope": "profile email",
...",
+        "apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: "AuthorizationPolicy"
metadata:
  name: "test-authorization-policy"
  namespace: dev
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: test
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        # paths: ["/test*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[realm_access.roles]
      values: ["TEST-READ"]",
+        "...
  "realm_access": {
    "roles": [
      "TEST-READ",
      "offline_access",
      "uma_authorization",
      "user"
    ]
  },
  "resource_access": {
    "istio": {
      "roles": [
        "user"
      ]
    },
    "account": {
      "roles": [
        "manage-account",
        "manage-account-links",
        "view-profile"
      ]
    }
  },
  "scope": "profile email",
  "realm_roles_array": [
      "TEST-READ",
      "offline_access",
      "uma_authorization",
      "user"
    ],
..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
